text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's not it. I made the most of the experience. I
think I've grown emotionally too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I'll be able to show off the new and
improved version of myself in future races. It's
just...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
When I think of having to say goodbye to the
fresh seafood they have here, I feel a slight hint
of sadness... down in my belly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should probably buy some food for Oguri Cap
to take home with her. I keep that in mind as
summer camp wraps up.
